sections.title: A: Write one word in each gap
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence:
Dear Sophie,
Hi! How are you? I went shopping with my cousin yesterday and tried (1) ...... several jackets. I was really surprised (2) ...... how many different styles there were. It reminded me (3) ...... the afternoon we spent in that huge shopping centre last summer.
I found a coat that is very much (4) ...... fashion right now, but I couldn't do it (5) ...... because the zip was broken! I might go back (6) ...... the weekend to see if they have another one. I bought some boots, though – they're similar (7) ...... the black ones you bought last month. I've got them (8) ...... now and they're really comfortable.
Also, I changed my old dress (9) ...... a skirt. I cut the top part (10) ...... and it looks much better!
Write soon,
Emily
The artist described her latest sculpture ......
options: B to the class, but they still looked confused.
C from the gallery because the frame was broken.
D from a dark city scene into a bright beach scene.
E of a dancer and it looked very realistic.
F on young artists around the world.
G as experimental, but it seemed quite traditional to me.

sections.title: C: Complete the second sentence using the word given
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
'I want to visit the art gallery,' Liam said. **said**
Liam ...... to visit the art gallery.

'We're designing a new museum,' said Mrs Parker. **they**
Mrs Parker ...... a new museum.

'We're meeting the architect tomorrow,' Daniel said. **day**
Daniel said they were meeting the architect ...... .

'Will you help me paint this wall?' Lucy asked. **paint**
Lucy asked ...... this wall.
She said that she ...... busy.
The guide told us ...... the paintings.
He asked me where ...... the tickets.
Tom said he ...... the exhibition the following day.
She told him not ...... the drawing.
They asked me if ...... interested in architecture.
Mia said she ...... the sculpture the week before.
He asked us ...... any photos inside the museum.
The artist explained that the colours ...... a special meaning.
She asked me when ...... .
He said he ...... visited that gallery before.
The teacher asked the class ...... their sketches carefully.
She told me that she ...... there the day before.
The guard warned us ...... near the wet paint.
